dashboard.label: AI RBA - False Positive Tracker
dashboard.description: Track false positive rates, top FP-generating entities, and suggested allowlist entries for AI RBA detections.

search.query: index=notable source="AI RBA -*" | stats count as total count(eval(status_label="Resolved - False Positive" OR status_label="Closed - False Positive")) as fp_count by source | eval fp_rate=round(fp_count/total*100, 1)."%" | sort - fp_count | rename source as "Detection", total as "Total Notables", fp_count as "False Positives", fp_rate as "FP Rate"

index=notable source="AI RBA -*" | stats count as total count(eval(status_label="Resolved - False Positive" OR status_label="Closed - False Positive")) as fp_count by source | eval fp_rate=round(fp_count/total*100, 1) | sort - fp_rate | rename source as "Detection", fp_rate as "FP Rate %"

index=notable source="AI RBA -*" (status_label="Resolved - False Positive" OR status_label="Closed - False Positive") | eval entity=coalesce(user, src, risk_object, "unknown") | stats count as fp_count dc(source) as detection_count values(source) as detections by entity | sort - fp_count | head 20 | rename entity as "Entity", fp_count as "FP Count", detection_count as "Detection Types", detections as "Detections"

index=notable source="AI RBA -*" (status_label="Resolved - False Positive" OR status_label="Closed - False Positive") | eval entity=coalesce(user, src, risk_object, "unknown") | eval provider=coalesce(provider, "unknown") | stats count as fp_count dc(source) as detection_count values(source) as detections latest(_time) as last_fp by entity provider | where fp_count>=3 | eval last_fp=strftime(last_fp, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M") | eval suggestion=case( match(entity, "^svc_|^srv_"), "Service account - add to ai_sanctioned_entities.csv with entity_type=user, scope=global", match(entity, "^\\d+\\.\\d+\\.\\d+\\.\\d+"), "IP address - add to ai_sanctioned_entities.csv with entity_type=system, scope=provider:".provider, true(), "User - add to ai_sanctioned_entities.csv with entity_type=user, scope=provider:".provider ) | sort - fp_count | rename entity as "Entity", provider as "Provider", fp_count as "FP Count", detection_count as "Detections", last_fp as "Last FP", suggestion as "Suggested Action"

index=notable source="AI RBA -*" | eval is_fp=if(status_label="Resolved - False Positive" OR status_label="Closed - False Positive", 1, 0) | timechart span=1d count as total_notables sum(is_fp) as false_positives | eval fp_rate=round(false_positives/total_notables*100, 1)
